title: ODI Matrix — NAICS 531120 Lessors of Nonresidential Buildings

sections.title: Step 1 — Error statements gathered
sections.content:
**Market needs (N-series, 14)** reconstructed from Step 09 JTBD cross-walk references.
**Product-related needs (P-series, 11)** imported verbatim from Step 10 FIT doc.

Total: **25 error statements**.

---

sections.title: Step 2 — Satisfaction recalibration (incumbent evidence)
sections.content:
Incumbents (Voltfang / Tesvolt / Commeo) sell **equipment + product warranty**, not EPC. Landlord still coordinates MV, civil, FGW TR8, DSO — those needs are worse-served than initial estimates. EMS depth is shallow across all three → revenue-stacking and CSRD needs recalibrated down. Battery-cell reliability and thermal suppression are mature → those satisfactions held or nudged up.

| Need | Pre-cal sat | Post-cal sat | Rationale |
|---|---|---|---|
| N4 time-to-energize | 4.0 | 3.5 | Split-vendor pattern adds 2–3 mo vs. single-source |
| N5 avoid DSO upgrade | 4.5 | 4.0 | Incumbents don't bundle MV design / HPC buffer logic |
| N11 ≥2 stacked revenue | 4.0 | 3.5 | Tesvolt/Voltfang EMS one-objective dispatch only |
| N14 CSRD evidence <4h | 4.5 | 4.0 | Incumbent EMS lacks audited emissions export |
| All others | — | unchanged | Step 03 did not contradict initial estimate |

Importance scores preserved (Ulwick "importance stability rule"). `product_related` flag carried through for P-series.

---

sections.title: Step 3 — ODI entries (post-recalibration, deterministic scoring)
sections.content:
Formula: `opp = importance + max(importance - satisfaction, 0)` · `is_underserved = imp > 7 AND sat < 5` · `is_overserved = imp < 3 AND sat > 7`.

### Market-level needs (N-series)

| # | Error statement | Imp | Sat | Opp | U | O | Job step |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| N3 | Minimize the likelihood that Baugenehmigung + VdS fire clearance is rejected on first submission | 7.5 | 6.0 | 9.00 | F | F | Prepare |
| N4 | Minimize the time from EPC contract signature to grid energization (≤9 mo) | 9.0 | 3.5 | 14.50 | **T** | F | Execute |
| N5 | Minimize the likelihood of a DSO upgrade charge exceeding €100k per MW | 9.0 | 4.0 | 14.00 | **T** | F | Prepare |
| N6 | Minimize the likelihood of DSO first-attempt grid-connection-acceptance rejection | 8.5 | 4.5 | 12.50 | **T** | F | Execute |
| N7 | Minimize the likelihood of FGW TR8 plant-certificate rework during commissioning | 8.0 | 5.0 | 11.00 | F | F | Execute |
| N8 | Minimize the likelihood of insurance underwriter declining or surcharging the asset | 8.0 | 6.0 | 10.00 | F | F | Confirm |
| N9 | Minimize the likelihood of peak-shave capture falling below 85% of modelled | 8.0 | 6.0 | 10.00 | F | F | Monitor |
| N10 | Minimize the likelihood of SoC-guardrail breach eroding manufacturer warranty | 7.0 | 6.5 | 7.50 | F | F | Monitor |
| N11 | Minimize the likelihood of operating with fewer than 2 stacked revenue streams at COD | 8.5 | 3.5 | 13.50 | **T** | F | Execute |
| N12 | Minimize the likelihood of SoH falling below 80% before end-of-lease payback | 8.5 | 5.5 | 11.50 | F | F | Monitor |
| N13 | Minimize the time to detect a thermal anomaly (<60 s) | 8.0 | 6.0 | 10.00 | F | F | Monitor |
| N14 | Minimize the time to produce auditable CSRD energy/emissions evidence (<4 h) | 7.5 | 4.0 | 11.00 | **T** | F | Monitor |
| N17 | Minimize the likelihood of a fire or thermal-runaway propagation event | 9.5 | 5.5 | 13.50 | F | F | Monitor |
| N20 | Minimize the likelihood of GRESB score not improving post-install via PV+BESS | 7.0 | 4.0 | 10.00 | F | F | Confirm |

### Product-related needs (P-series, product_related=true)

| # | Error statement | Imp | Sat | Opp | U | O |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| P1 | Minimize likelihood of thermal-runaway propagation cell→module→container in dense Li-ion pack | 9.5 | 5.0 | 14.00 | F | F |
| P2 | Minimize likelihood that VdS/Feuerwehr reject fire-compartment layout for >3 MWh clusters | 8.5 | 5.0 | 12.00 | F | F |
| P3 | Minimize likelihood of DSO rejection due to insufficient MV feeder headroom at target parcel | 9.0 | 4.0 | 14.00 | **T** | F |
| P4 | Minimize likelihood that 40–80 m²/MWh footprint + clearances exceed parcel envelope | 8.0 | 5.0 | 11.00 | F | F |
| P5 | Minimize time to obtain FGW TR8 type-B + DSO acceptance on promised energization date | 8.5 | 4.0 | 13.00 | **T** | F |
| P6 | Minimize likelihood of LFP cell-lot CN FX/tariff/CRMA shock invalidating fixed-price EPC | 7.0 | 4.0 | 10.00 | F | F |
| P7 | Minimize likelihood of roundtrip-efficiency <85% at −10°C / +35°C eroding peak-shave margin | 7.0 | 5.5 | 8.50 | F | F |
| P8 | Minimize likelihood that 10–15% AC-AC loss + aux HVAC is mis-modelled in business case | 7.5 | 6.0 | 9.00 | F | F |
| P9 | Minimize likelihood that installed CAPEX drifts above €400/kWh during procurement | 8.0 | 4.5 | 11.50 | **T** | F |
| P10 | Minimize time to recover footprint + remediate per EU Battery Reg at end-of-life | 6.0 | 3.5 | 8.50 | F | F |
| P11 | Minimize likelihood of LFP calendar ageing driving SoH <80% before lease payback | 8.0 | 5.0 | 11.00 | F | F |

---

sections.title: Step 4 — Market ODI summary
sections.content:
| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| total_needs | 25 |
| underserved_count | **8** (N4, N5, N6, N11, N14, P3, P5, P9) |
| overserved_count | **0** (no need has importance < 3) |
| avg_opportunity_score | **11.22** |

### Top 5 opportunities (descending opp_score)

| Rank | Opp | Statement |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | 14.50 | Minimize the time from EPC contract signature to grid energization (≤9 mo) |
| 2 | 14.00 | Minimize the likelihood of a DSO upgrade charge exceeding €100k per MW |
| 3 | 14.00 | Minimize likelihood of thermal-runaway propagation cell→module→container in dense Li-ion pack |
| 4 | 14.00 | Minimize likelihood of DSO rejection due to insufficient MV feeder headroom at target parcel |
| 5 | 13.50 | Minimize the likelihood of operating with fewer than 2 stacked revenue streams at COD |

---

sections.title: Step 5 — Cross-check vs. Step 09 Feature-Market Fit
sections.content:
| Metric | Value | Flag |
|---|---|---|
| ODI avg_opportunity_score | 11.22 | — |
| Step 09 avg overall_fit (tech features) | 6.00 | — |
| Step 11 avg vendor-feature score | 7.67 | — |

**Cross-check result:** No anomaly. ODI avg (11.22) indicates meaningful unmet need; vendor-feature avg (7.67) suggests Mein Solar's three superior features (PV+BESS integrated design, HPC buffer, single-source EPC) are well-matched to underserved needs. Specifically:

| Top underserved ODI need | Mein Solar vendor feature that addresses it |
|---|---|
| N4 time-to-energize | #9 Single-Source EPC Contract Vehicle |
| N5 DSO upgrade avoidance | #7 HPC Buffer + #6 PV+BESS Integrated Design |
| P3 MV feeder headroom rejection | #6 PV+BESS (shared MV) + #7 HPC Buffer |
| N6 DSO first-attempt acceptance | #5 Grid-Code Certification + #9 Single-Source |
| P5 FGW TR8 on-date | #5 Grid-Code Certification (tech must_be) + #9 Single-Source |
| N11 ≥2 revenue streams | Feature gap — vendor EMS is technology-scope; no vendor-superior EMS feature |

**Structural finding:** Mein Solar's differentiators (features 5, 6, 7, 9) directly address 5 of 8 underserved needs. The EMS revenue-stacking gap (N11, N14) is a **capability build** — same Kano one_dimensional feature (#4) where Mein Solar is at parity with incumbents.

---

sections.title: QA Checklist
sections.content:
| # | Check | Result |
|---|---|---|
| Q1 | Formula correct on 5 spot-checks (N4, N11, P1, P5, P9) | ✅ PASS |
| Q2 | is_underserved = imp>7 AND sat<5 — all 8 entries compliant | ✅ PASS |
| Q3 | is_overserved = imp<3 AND sat>7 — 0 entries (no low-importance needs in set) | ✅ PASS |
| Q4 | total ≥ Step 06 count — 25 ≥ 14, Step 10 added 11 ✓ | ✅ PASS |
| Q5 | Top-5 sorted descending by opp_score | ✅ PASS |
| Q6 | Cross-check vs Step 09 Feature-Fit ran | ✅ PASS |

---

Step 03 did not contradict initial estimate

cross_check_vs_step_09.interpretation: Meaningful unmet need (ODI 11.22) aligns with Mein Solar vendor-feature superiority (7.67). Three of three vendor features map onto five of eight underserved needs. EMS revenue-stacking gap (N11, N14) is a capability build, not a differentiator.
